title: Old Chests
description: Mod return old minecraft chests from beta versions.
body:
![Old Chests](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4678ce206ec18230c3c28e18543e926302ad9083.png)
**This mod return chests from minecraft beta.**
![Small Chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5fb86e8bd66bc5cc6acd40328cddf96f82ab7b2.png)
## This mod adds
- **Small Chest**
Have 27 slots of storage
- **Big Chest**
Have 54 slots of storage
## Recipe for Chest
![Recipe for small chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e7f91eb6846f8a58215d0ed8706b2ede8574514.png)

- Report bugs on Discord server
- Code of mod is inspirated NorthWestTrees's mccreator tutorial series
